name: Suguru and Satoru
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐝…

Being born into the Gojo clan already isn't the easiest way to live, but as the Gojo-clan found out that Satoru had a child with his omega-husband Suguru, they were not amused.

I tried to put the clan mainly into the background, also who's POV you'll take is open. Have fun :)
creator: Ilovepancake
